creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: danfe
Date: Sat Apr 11 13:20:11 UTC 2015
New revision: 383800
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/383800

Log:
  - Update to version 2.768; canonicalize Makefile header
  - Add LICENSE knob (ART10 GPLv2; multi)
  - Drop unneeded "xt" from USE_XORG and adjust its position
  - Improve test target by using -C and thus get rid of "cd"
  - Remove ".if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}" guard, no longer needed

  PR:	199240

Changes:
  head/lang/yabasic/Makefile
  head/lang/yabasic/distinfo
